items.caption: A vibrant poster for culinary arts and cooking courses. The background is a lively green, adorned with a red and white striped border. The poster is divided into three distinct sections, each filled with illustrations and text. The top section features the title "culinary arts and cooking courses", inviting viewers to explore the world of cooking. The middle section showcases a collage of illustrations depicting various cooking activities, including chopping vegetables, stirring a pot, and rolling dough.
